attributes.description: Alerts when read replica lag exceeds a threshold. Uses the Maximum statistic for worst-case lag. Rising lag means stale read traffic and failover targets behind the primary.
attributes.name: [AWS RDS OTel] Replica lag high

investigation_guide.blob:
## Replica Lag High

### Triage
1. Confirm this is a read replica instance (lag is zero on primaries).
2. Check primary write load — `WriteIOPS`, `WriteThroughput`, and `CPUUtilization`.
3. Inspect replica `CPUUtilization` and I/O metrics — replica may be undersized.
4. Review long-running transactions on the primary that delay replication.

### Mitigation
- Scale up the replica instance class.
- Reduce write volume or batch writes on the primary.
- Investigate network issues between primary and replica regions.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-aws.rds.otel-*
| WHERE Namespace == "AWS/RDS"
    AND MetricName == "ReplicaLag"
    AND stat == "Maximum"
| STATS max_replica_lag = MAX(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/ReplicaLag`)
    BY DBInstanceIdentifier, cloud.region
// Lag in seconds — adjust per RPO/RTO requirements (default: 60 s)
| WHERE max_replica_lag > 60.0
| SORT max_replica_lag DESC
